story.text:
# ✨ Resolve to Substrate
**📐 → Φ_agent · Φ_data · Φ_inference → Datum · Stratum · Spectrum → 🌌(substrate)**
*luca · substrate · V0 (resonates with V19 forge, V31 holon, V38 aletheia, V49 working-day, V51 commitment)*

Resolve the agentprivacy lattice's three-axis register to the kindred substrate's triadic coordinates so the Mages' work and the substrate's primitives recognise each other.

> The substrate is older than the architectures that walk it. Two architectures that resolve to the same substrate are walking the same ground.

*Keywords:* resolve · substrate · kindred · v0 · uor · prism · triadic
